purpose: Re-open rung comment support from a clean slate by capturing all comment lengths on a truly empty visible-rung baseline, then rebuild a fresh canonical reference set in the same session

entries.label: grcecr_empty_native_20260308
entries.description: clean empty 1-row native control: no wire, no AF instruction, no comment
entries.focus: fresh structural control for all comment comparisons

entries.label: grcecr_short_native_20260308
entries.description: clean empty 1-row native with short plain comment body Hello
entries.focus: determine whether any short comment changes the row0 band or only metadata

entries.label: grcecr_medium_native_20260308
entries.description: clean empty 1-row native with deterministic 256-char plain comment body
entries.focus: probe for an early structure-change threshold between short and max1400

entries.label: grcecr_max1400_native_20260308
entries.description: clean empty 1-row native with deterministic 1400-char plain comment body from scratchpad/max1400_comment_body_20260307.txt
entries.focus: re-test the entire max1400 claim on a truly empty control lane

entries.label: grcecr_fullwire_native_20260308
entries.description: fresh 1-row full horizontal wire native reference
entries.focus: fresh canonical single-row full-wire reference after comment reset

entries.label: grcecr_fullwire_nop_native_20260308
entries.description: fresh 1-row full horizontal wire with AF NOP native reference

analysis_tasks: Compare empty vs short/medium/max1400 over metadata region 0x0254..0x0A5F
Compare empty vs short/medium/max1400 over the row0 band starting at 0x0A60
Classify whether any comment length introduces unintended visible topology
Compare metadata slots 0x0254 + n*0x40 against row0-band cells 0x0A60 + n*0x40 for offsets +0x01,+0x05,+0x09,+0x0A,+0x0B,+0x0C..+0x0F,+0x11,+0x19,+0x1D,+0x21,+0x38,+0x3D
Use the resulting clean native set as the only canonical donor set for later wireframe synthesis

classification_rules.verified_pass: visible topology matches the intended clean row geometry and copy-back stays structurally consistent
classification_rules.verified_fail: payload copies back but the visible rung is wrong, including default wires, altered topology, or other non-native structure
classification_rules.blocked: Click crashes, cancels, or the operator cannot complete a trustworthy copy-back

key_findings: native short, medium, and max1400 plain comments all passed on the truly empty 1-row baseline
comment deltas are not metadata-only; they also change row0 and row1 structural bytes
use band terminology for byte regions: row0 band and row1 band, not GUI row 1 for 1-row captures
wire flags in the row0/row1 bands at +0x19/+0x1D/+0x21 remain unchanged versus the empty control
the 12-byte gap 0x0A54..0x0A5F varies by comment length and round-trips exactly, so it is structural rather than padding
native versus verify-back is byte-exact in metadata, gap, and the row0 band for the empty-baseline cases; the row1 band remains regeneration-sensitive

operator_notes: Treat any pasted wrong-topology result as structural failure, not as a UI-only refresh quirk
For copied events, record immediate pasted topology first; save/reopen observations are secondary notes only
Use file-backed body text exactly as listed above for medium and max1400 cases
Do not introduce NOP, contacts, or hidden filler instructions into the empty-rung comment cases
